name: newon
description: Newon — a modern, neon music visualizer for macOS that listens to whatever you're playing (Spotify) and paints it in flowing light. Inspired by the Xbox 360 'Neon' visualizer.
author: jomcabe

extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Newon can use your microphone as a fallback source to react to music playing nearby.
extendInfo.NSScreenCaptureUsageDescription: Newon captures your Mac's system audio so it can react to the music you're playing (for example, Spotify).
extendInfo.NSAppleEventsUsageDescription: Newon reads the currently playing track from Spotify to show a subtle now-playing overlay and synced lyrics.
